t.t-if: company.partner_id.street2 or company.partner_id.city or company.partner_id.zip or company.partner_id.state_id or company.partner_id.country_id and res_config.show_country
company.partner_id.city or company.partner_id.zip or company.partner_id.state_id or company.partner_id.country_id and res_config.show_country
company.partner_id.zip or company.partner_id.state_id or company.partner_id.country_id and res_config.show_country

t.t-value: o.partner_id or (o.move_lines and o.move_lines[0].partner_id) or False

t.t-if: company.partner_id.street2 or company.partner_id.city or company.partner_id.zip or company.partner_id.state_id or company.partner_id.country_id and res_config.show_country

table.t-attf-class: #{'ks_table_pick-1' if ks_style == 'ks_style_4' else 'ks_table_pick' if ks_style == 'ks_style_7' else ''} #{'ks_table' if ks_style not in [ 'ks_style_4', 'ks_style_7'] else ''}
table.name: stock_move_table

thead.t-attf-class: #{'border-top border-bottom' if ks_style == 'ks_style_10' else ''} #{'custom-table-header' if ks_style == 'ks_style_4' else ''}

th.name: th_sm_product

table.t-attf-class: #{'ks_table_pick-1' if ks_style == 'ks_style_4' else 'ks_table_pick' if ks_style == 'ks_style_7' else ''} #{'ks_table' if ks_style not in [ 'ks_style_4', 'ks_style_7'] else ''}
table.name: stock_move_line_table

thead.t-attf-class: #{'border-top border-bottom' if ks_style == 'ks_style_10' else ''} #{'custom-table-header' if ks_style == 'ks_style_4' else ''}

th.t-attf-class: #{'ks_table_design_4' if ks_style in ['ks_style_4','ks_style_7'] else ''} ks_product_desc ks_table_head_backgrnd_color ks_table_head_text_color ks_table_head_text_size
th.name: th_sml_product

p.span: All items couldn't be shipped, the following items will be shipped as soon as they become available.

table.t-attf-class: #{'ks_table_pick-1' if ks_style == 'ks_style_4' else ''} #{'ks_table_pick' if ks_style == 'ks_style_7' else 'ks_table'}
table.name: stock_backorder_table

th.t-attf-class: #{'ks_table_design_4' if ks_style in ['ks_style_4','ks_style_7'] else ''} ks_product_desc ks_table_head_backgrnd_color ks_table_head_text_color ks_table_head_text_size
th.name: th_sb_product

tr.t-att-class: 'bg-200 font-weight-bold o_line_section' if prev_line.display_type=='line_section' else 'font-italic o_line_note'
'bg-200 font-weight-bold o_line_section' if prev_line.display_type=='line_section' else 'font-italic o_line_note'
